title: Teezl

{{Quote|The teezl could have increased Imperial communications a thousand-fold. I do not take its destruction lightly.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="SW 63">[[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]]</ref>}}
A '''teezl''', also referred to as a '''screamer''', was a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]], bluish, luminous, swirling creature that could be used as a natural [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] communications amplifier. A living example of a teezl was discovered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Valtha Divide/Legends|Valtha Divide]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], its abilities caused the Empire to immediately recognize its potential as a difference-maker in the ongoing war with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. However, a resulting Rebel [[Operation Earplug|operation]] to prevent the teezl's integration into the Imperial war machine resulted in the teezl's destruction, and the death of the only known member of the mysterious [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|The teezl is a freak of nature—an organic communicator, able to take electrically supplied information input and transmit it at the speed of thought to any receptor in the galaxy!|Mils Giel|<ref name="marvel61" />}}
Found deep within the distant [[Valtha Divide/Legends|Valtha Divide]],<ref name="egw" /> the the many-spined teezl—colloquially known as a "screamer"—was a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] creature noted for its unique abilities as an organic communicator, able to transmit electronically submitted information to any receptor in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] instantaneously. It also had significant powers to disrupt communications: it could be prompted to interfere with signals on all but a selected wavelength. This interference manifested itself as sort of a psychic shriek, which manifested a powerful blanket of static. The teezl obediently followed orders transmitted to it with a sort of electronic prod. The enigmatic teezl appeared as an enormous blue oval with hundreds of intersecting white circles within its mass.<ref name="marvel61" />

==History==
{{Quote|Though the teezl is nonsentient, nonfeeling, perhaps not even intelligent, it is alive. And for the glory of the Empire—not to mention the continuation of my own career—I fully intend to keep it that way!|Mils Giel|<ref name="marvel61" />}}
[[File:TeezlOrders.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The teezl is ordered to disrupt Rebel communications.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], scouts<ref name="marvel61" /> from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] discovered a living example of a teezl<ref name="arbra">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030605arbra|text=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm|int=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm}}</ref> within the Valtha Divide,<ref name="egw" /> quickly learning of its prodigious abilities. Believing the teezl to be the only one of its kind, the Empire formed a large [[secret armada]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]] to transport the creature to the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="arbra" /> The teezl itself was kept within Giel's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Praetor Mark II-class battlecruiser|''Praetor Mark II''-class battlecruiser]] ''[[Helmsman (battlecruiser)|Helmsman]]''.<ref name="egw" /> Giel saw the teezl as potentially a game-changing edge in the war with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], as the creature's use could allow for instantaneous coordination of every part of the war effort.<ref name="marvel61" />

However, the Rebels learned of the creature's existence, and launched a clandestine initiative called [[Operation Earplug]] to make sure the teezl never reached Coruscant. A small [[Flying Bantha Squadron|group]] of Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] obtained several rebuilt [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]<ref name="arbra" /> from weapons dealer [[Orion Ferret]],<ref name="marvel59">[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]]</ref> and used them to infiltrate Giel's armada.<ref name="arbra" /> The Rebel [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] attacked from within and caused a frenzied firefight amongst the Imperial ships, one that only got more chaotic when Giel commanded the teezl to interfere with the Rebels' radio signals. However, that didn't deter Skywalker, who managed to destroy the teezl's transport cage and destroy the creature, taking much of Giel's ''Helmsman'' with it.<ref name="marvel61" />

==Behind the scenes==
The teezl first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' 61]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel61" />
